# T-OS-450: Generated file checksum + manual-edit detection
> bash scripts/codex/run-in-worktree.sh T-OS-450 --keep-worktree
> Iron Law: git add/commit/push 禁止

## Required
- scripts/org/check-generated-checksums.py: 全 generated file の checksum を SQLite view_checksums テーブルと比較
- mismatch ありなら exit 1 + 該当ファイル listed
- DASHBOARD.generated.md, TASKS.generated.yaml, GLOSSARY.generated.md, DECISIONS.generated.md (生成済のみ)
- tests/kernel/test-checksum-verify.sh (4+ tests)

## Allowed: scripts/org/check-generated-checksums.py, tests/kernel/
